body.title: [sprint] Legacy pinned-model dispatch tests (test_inference_via_bus) red since typed-no-path — never run in that ticket
body.description:
8 tests in tests/test_inference_via_bus.py (TestDispatchOpenRouter + TestDispatchOllama) fail: a dispatch that pins model='openai/gpt-4o-mini' now hits the dimensional resolver's TYPED no-path (NO_AVAILABLE_PROVIDER, health monitor marks sources down in the hermetic env) and returns a typed error response WITHOUT reaching the legacy _mode HTTP path the tests mock (requests.post). Confirmed PRE-EXISTING at HEAD via isolated worktree (not caused by T-inference-escalation-policy-object). This is blast-radius from T-inference-typed-no-path-result: those tests live at tests/ root, and that ticket only ran tests/inference/ + a couple consumer files, so their breakage went unseen.

DECIDE which it is, then fix: (a) a TEST-HARNESS GAP — the tests pin an unregistered model and expect the legacy path, but dispatch's legacy fallback only fires when `not request.model`; update the tests to the current dispatch contract (mock a live provider / assert the typed no-path); or (b) a REAL legacy-path regression — the pinned-model→legacy-mode path is genuinely unreachable now and should be. Instrument, don't guess.

**Affected files:** tests/test_inference_via_bus.py, unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py (dispatch legacy _mode branch) — read-only unless (b).
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (n/a), test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — reconcile these 8 tests with the typed-no-path dispatch contract. OUT — changing the typed-no-path routing behavior itself (that is the intended contract).
**Test plan:** the 8 tests pass green under the hermetic env; if (b), add a red->green asserting the pinned-model legacy path is reachable/unreachable as decided.
**Proof obligation:** a hollow build cannot make all 8 pass while ALSO leaving the tests/inference typed-no-path suite green — the fix must reconcile both contracts, not weaken one.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
